ns0:entry.ns0:title: AlistGo/alist
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AlistGo/alist
Language: go
🗂️A file list/WebDAV program that supports multiple storages, powered by Gin and Solidjs. / 一个支持多存储的文件列表/WebDAV程序，使用 Gin 和 Solidjs。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Billionmail/BillionMail
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Billionmail/BillionMail
Language: go
BillionMail gives you open-source MailServer, NewsLetter, Email Marketing — fully self-hosted, dev-friendly, and free from monthly fees. Join the discord: https://discord.gg/asfXzBUhZr

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FiloSottile/age
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FiloSottile/age
Language: go
A simple, modern and secure encryption tool (and Go library) with small explicit keys, no config options, and UNIX-style composability.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Gentleman-Programming/engram
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/engram
Language: go
Persistent memory system for AI coding agents. Agent-agnostic Go binary with SQLite + FTS5, MCP server, HTTP API, CLI, and TUI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
Language: go
CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MHSanaei/3x-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui
Language: go
Xray panel supporting multi-protocol multi-user expire day & traffic & IP limit (Vmess, Vless, Trojan, ShadowSocks, Wireguard, Hysteria, Tunnel, Mixed, HTTP, Tun, MTProto)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: XTLS/RealiTLScanner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/XTLS/RealiTLScanner
Language: go
A TLS server scanner for Reality

ns0:entry.ns0:title: authelia/authelia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/authelia/authelia
Language: go
The Single Sign-On Multi-Factor portal for web apps, now OpenID Certified™

ns0:entry.ns0:title: avelino/awesome-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/avelino/awesome-go
Language: go
A curated list of awesome Go frameworks, libraries and software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: caddyserver/caddy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/caddyserver/caddy
Language: go
Fast and extensible multi-platform HTTP/1-2-3 web server with automatic HTTPS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gofiber/fiber
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gofiber/fiber
Language: go
⚡️ Express inspired web framework written in Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: influxdata/telegraf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/influxdata/telegraf
Language: go
Agent for collecting, processing, aggregating, and writing metrics, logs, and other arbitrary data.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netdata/netdata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netdata/netdata
Language: go
The fastest path to AI-powered full stack observability, even for lean teams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ollama/ollama
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ollama/ollama
Language: go
Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: perber/leafwiki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/perber/leafwiki
Language: go
LeafWiki - Self-hosted wiki. Single Go binary, SQLite, Markdown on disk. No external database required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pocket-id/pocket-id
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pocket-id/pocket-id
Language: go
An easy-to-use OpenID Connect Certified™ and OAuth 2.0 provider that lets users sign in to your applications with passkeys.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pressly/goose
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pressly/goose
Language: go
A database migration tool. Supports SQL migrations and Go functions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rcourtman/Pulse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rcourtman/Pulse
Language: go
Monitoring for Proxmox, Docker, Kubernetes, TrueNAS, and vSphere that watches your infrastructure for you: smart alerts, AI patrols that catch silent failures, and verified fixes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: schollz/croc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/schollz/croc
Language: go
Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sundowndev/phoneinfoga
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sundowndev/phoneinfoga
Language: go
Information gathering framework for phone numbers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: syncthing/syncthing
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/syncthing/syncthing
Language: go
Open Source Continuous File Synchronization

ns0:entry.ns0:title: traefik/traefik
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/traefik/traefik
Language: go
The Cloud Native Application Proxy
